long_desc: A shimmering portal leading to Midgaard has been placed here.
A bottle of imported beer has been left here.
A dark bottle of stout malt liquor has been left here.
A glass of firebreather was left here.
A dark bottle of some special brew was left here.

extra_descs.desc:
This beautiful flowing robe is the prized possesion of the magi.  It is
strange to find it here.

long_desc: A green robe of the magi lies here.

extra_descs.desc: The robe of the order of the red magi.  Very well made.

long_desc: A beautiful red magi robe

extra_descs.desc: The robe of the order of the blue magi.  Very well made.

long_desc: A blue robe sits here.

extra_descs.desc:
Round, rumpled, and covered in lures, this hat must have been someone's
favorite.

long_desc: A round fishing hat has been left here.

extra_descs.desc:
The waybread is the traditional feed of elves when traveling, they call it
lembas.  It is said to refresh the weary traveler greatly.

long_desc: Some waybread has been put here.

extra_descs.desc: These rations are bland and serve no other purpose than to keep you alive.

long_desc: Some dried rations has been left here.

extra_descs.desc:
The apple looks fresh, except for one small worm hole in, nothing wrong with
a little protien in your diet.

long_desc: A nice looking delicious red apple has been left here.

extra_descs.desc: The crescent looks warm and flaky, just how you like it...

long_desc: A tasty looking crescent has been dropped here.

extra_descs.desc:
This is the kind of liquor that makes successful peopl into sloppy drunks.
You sure you're man or woman enough to drink this stuff?

long_desc: A shot of bourbon is here.

extra_descs.desc: Heavily salted, you better buy a drink if you're gonna eat this thing.

long_desc: A pretzel has been left here.

extra_descs.desc:
The door is propped open, the glint of gold coins sparkles from the lantern
overhead.  Looks like enough gold is contained within to retire and live a full
life.  Too bad no one ever steals from this bank.

long_desc: A huge safe sits behind the counter, filled with gold coins.

extra_descs.desc:
The bench is carved out of a single block of black granite and has been
polished to a smooth shine.

long_desc: A bench of black polished granite looks mighty uncomfortable.

extra_descs.desc:
Chain mail shirts, leggings, helms, sleeves, everything an adventurer could
ever need.

long_desc: A rack of armor rests here against one wall.

extra_descs.desc:
Swords, clubs, implements of masss destruction for the taking, at the right
price of course

long_desc: A rack of weapons leans against the wall.

extra_descs.desc:
An expertly woven silken cloth of very high quality, most magi would die
before giving one of these up.

long_desc: A yellow robe of the Magi was left here, how strange.

extra_descs.desc:
A simple dagger used by thieves and hoodlums to relieve the unwary of their
money.

long_desc: A dagger with a long thin blade is here.

extra_descs.desc: The basic sword of the Sanctus army.  Nothing spectacular about it.

long_desc: A small sword lies here.

extra_descs.desc: This simple robe is the type used by Magi of the gray order.

long_desc: An exquisite gray robe is rumpled in a corner.

extra_descs.desc: Your basic club, nothing very remarkeable about it.

long_desc: A simple looking wooden club is here.

extra_descs.desc:
This mace is made of a heavy polished metal with small spikes on the end.
Look deadly

long_desc: A mace is here.

extra_descs.desc: A strange weapon, you wonder if you even know how to use it.

long_desc: A large flail is here.

extra_descs.desc:
Another impressive robe of the Magi.  This robe looks to be in very good
shape.

long_desc: A magnificent purple robe was deserted here.

extra_descs.desc:
These, heavy, wicked looking knuckles could do some serious damage if worn
on the hands.

long_desc: Some brass knuckles are here.

extra_descs.desc:
A perfectly good cigarette, home-made by the looks of it, but wrapped very
neatly.

long_desc: An un-smoked cigarette has been left here.

extra_descs.desc:
This robe is very hard to focus on.  When you stare at it your eyes seem to
slide right off the black velvety material.

long_desc: A black robe of the Magi hangs on a small coatrack.

extra_descs.desc: Your basic torch, nothing very remarkeable about it.

long_desc: A large torch.

extra_descs.desc:
Your basic lantern, nothing very remarkeable about it.  Just a fuel tank,
glass covering and a wick.

long_desc: A brass lantern is here.

extra_descs.desc: A simple bag to help you carry all of your belongings.

long_desc: A small bag is here.

extra_descs.desc: A hefty backpack that can carry more than a bag.

long_desc: A backpack is here.

extra_descs.desc: It looks mangled and chewed, the dog probably pulled it off.

long_desc: A dog collar was left here, what happened to the poor dog?

extra_descs.desc: This stuff drives cats bonkers.

long_desc: A pile of catnip is here waiting for a cat to enjoy it.

extra_descs.desc:
Looks like the streetsweep must be taking a break, he left his broom lying
here.

long_desc: A broom is lying on the floor.

extra_descs.desc: You think that's whisky in there.  The glass is so filthy you can't be sure.

long_desc: A filthy glass of whiskey was left here, waiting to be emptied.

extra_descs.desc:
A very fancy and tall glass holding some white wine.  The drink of the
middle class.

long_desc: A glass of white wine is here.

extra_descs.desc:
A tall glass with a long skinny stem.  The type of glass that rich folk use
to drink bubbly.

long_desc: A champagn glass sits on the ground.

extra_descs.desc: A rugged looking cloth jacket.

long_desc: A jacket is lying on the floor

extra_descs.desc: Rugged looking brown leather gloves.

long_desc: A pair of leather gloves lie here.

extra_descs.desc: It's small, it's wooden.

long_desc: A small wooden shield is lying on the ground.

extra_descs.desc:
These pants are in very good condition.  They would provide minimal
protection during a fight.

long_desc: A pair of black leather pants lie on the ground.
short_desc: a pair of black leather pants

long_desc: A leather helm is lying on the ground.
A scale mail jacket is lying on the ground.
A pool of blood from a recent kill has collected here.

extra_descs.desc: This beer looks and tastes like formaldehyde.

long_desc: Some exotic beer from far away.

extra_descs.desc:
These gaudy velvet pants are meant for a royal court, not adventuring.
Most respectable adventurers wouldn't even be caught dead in these things.

long_desc: A pair of blue pants made from a fine fabric.

extra_descs.desc: The streetsweeper uses this to clean up the city.

long_desc: A dustpan has been left here.

extra_descs.desc:
This fine silken shirt could fetch a nice price if it wasn't in such poor
shape.  Frills of lace line the collar and cuffs.  The kind of shirt one would
wear to a court or very fancy social gathering.

long_desc: A fine white shirt is crumpled into a ball.

extra_descs.desc:
The vest is far more extravagant than anything you have ever worn before.
Fancy designs run up and down it's length.  This would look very nice over a
fancy shirt.

long_desc: A red vest was left here.

extra_descs.desc:
It looks to be carved from some type of hard wood.  Maybe oak or maple.
Only traces of varnish can be seen on the wood that has been worn smooth from
time and use.

long_desc: An old worn cane lies here in the dust.

extra_descs.desc:
It looks more like a rat than anything else.  Some balding people wear these
things to try and look younger.  The can sometimes fetch a good price at the
local pawn if they are of high enough quality.  This one unfortunately, isn't.

long_desc: A brown mass of hair almost looks like a small animal, it must be someon's touppe.

extra_descs.desc:
It is made of both metal and wood, a large footpedal can be pumped to make
the strange contraption lower and raise a needle through the cloth.  Very
ingenious contraption.  It is the only one in the city and because of it Carla
has a monopoly on clothing.

long_desc: A sewing machine is covered in clothes.

extra_descs.desc:
Made from the feathers of a very large bird this duster is extremely clean
considering the purpose it is supposed to serve.  Then again maybe it is just
used to make the person holding it look busy.

long_desc: A feather duster lies in the dirt.

extra_descs.desc:
The initials NJW are inscribed in gold lettering.  Very fancy.  Whoever had
this must have been well off.  The drawstring used to hold it to a belt has
been cleanly cut.  Must be someone had their purse snatched.

long_desc: Someone's purse has been left here.
This is Gunney's hat, better not be caught wearing it.
A set of coveralls lies here.

extra_descs.desc:
@n
recall Room - teleport Sanctus
Newbie Zones - teleport Newbie
Food - 1d, 3s, 1e, 1n
1d, 3s, 1w, 1n
Water - 1d, 3n, 2e, 1s
Donation Room - 1d, 1n, 1w
Cleric Guild - 1d, 7s, 3w, 2u
Warrior Guild - 1d, 7n, 5w, 1n, 1u
Mage Guild - 1d, 7s, 2e, 2u
Thief Guild - 1d, 7n, 4e, 1n, 1u
Post Office - 1d, 3n, 1w, 1s
Bank - 1d, 3n, 1e, 1s

long_desc: A list of directions to important areas within Sanctus lies here.

extra_descs.desc: The face of the timer has the number one to ten on it with two hands.

long_desc: A kitchen timer has been abandoned here.

extra_descs.desc:
The animal is impossible to identify.  Just a collection of intestines, a
stomach, maybe a liver.  Hard to tell with the it dripping in blood.

long_desc: The entrails of a sacrificial animal.

extra_descs.desc: A sturdy row boat with three seats and paddles bolted in the middle.

long_desc: A row boat has been left here.

extra_descs.desc:
You would have to be crazy to attemp to cross large bodies of water with the
thing.

long_desc: A floatation device has been left here.

extra_descs.desc:
Even though they really don't look like bacon, they smell strangely similiar
to it.  The front of the bag reads 'Dogs don't know its not bacon.  '

long_desc: A poor dog lost their treats here.

extra_descs.desc: Just a plain old cup of water.  Nothing special about it.

long_desc: A cup has been left here.

extra_descs.desc: The pants are filthy, but wearable.

long_desc: A pair of cloth pants is rumpled up into a ball.

extra_descs.desc: The kind of cap a street urchin might wear.

long_desc: A cloth cap rests on the ground.

extra_descs.desc:
The shirt looks pretty rugged.  The plain dirty white cloth would provide
some protection.

long_desc: A cloth shirt lays on the ground.

extra_descs.desc:
These shoes are more like moccassins than anything else.  A strip of leather
on their soles should make them last a long time and protect your feet very
well.

long_desc: A pair of cloth shoes are here.

extra_descs.desc:
They are a ditry white color, with the fingers cut off, these gloves look
useful.

long_desc: A pair of cloth gloves have been left here.

extra_descs.desc:
The staff is too short for use by the average human.  It is well made from an
extremely straight and unspoiled oak.  Silver gilding has been added in a spiral
giving the staff extra strength and support.

long_desc: A short staff of oak gilded in silver looks well made.
short_desc: a short gilded staff of oak

extra_descs.desc:
This dog toy barely even resembles its namesake.  The long yellow body is
elongated and several holes have been chewed into it.  Its feet and crown are a
strange orange color.  I small plug is stuck where its butt should be and makes
a squeaking noise when you squeeze it.

long_desc: A yellow rubber chicken has been chewed half to death.

extra_descs.desc:
The die has been carefully carved out of bone with black spots painted on
each of its 10 sides accordingly.  @RROLL DIE@n

long_desc: A ten sided die is waiting to be rolled

extra_descs.desc:
The hairball is about the size of a childs fist and has a fetid odor of dead
mice.

long_desc: A hairball was left here from what must have been a very large cat.

extra_descs.desc:
The rope is suspended in the middle of the room and rises into the darkness
of the ceiling above. It looks like it might be attached to a bell in the tower
above.

long_desc: A long rope hangs down through the middle of the room.

extra_descs.desc:
Commonly known as a cigarette (or fag if you practice the Queen's English)
this addictive, cancer causing carcinogen was once thought to be cool.

long_desc: A cancer stick was left here by someone gone cold turkey.

extra_descs.desc: This canteen is pretty old and has acquired a strange smell.

long_desc: A canteen has been set on the ground here.

extra_descs.desc: The meat is some form of venison.  Hard to tell since it is rather filthy.

long_desc: An hunk of meat lies here covered in dirt.

extra_descs.desc:
The platinum bar is formed perfectly into a rectangular block.  Its surface
is smooth and polished.

long_desc: A bar of platinum must have been dropped here.

extra_descs.desc:
The mithril bar is formed perfectly into a rectangular block.  Its surface
is smooth and polished.

long_desc: A bar of mithril must have been dropped here.

extra_descs.desc:
The gold bar is formed perfectly into a rectangular block.  Its surface is
smooth and polished.

long_desc: A bar of gold must have been dropped here.

extra_descs.desc:
The silver bar is formed perfectly into a rectangular block.  Its surface is
smooth and polished.

long_desc: A bar of silver must have been dropped here.
A scroll is rolled up here.

extra_descs.desc:
The mushrooms appear not to be poisonous and are relatively clean. They look
edible.

long_desc: A clump of mushrooms is growing here.

extra_descs.desc:
The chest is in excellent condition.  Made from a fine grain of wood it is
stained and polished to a shine.  Bands of iron to wrap around the chest.  But,
the lock hangs open.

long_desc: A large wooden chest with bands of iron circling it is closed with its lock hanging open.

extra_descs.desc:
The staff appears to have been twisted into a strange spiral up along its
surface.  The top has three claws meant to hold something.  It is conspicuosly
empty.

long_desc: A gnarled wooden staff beacons you.

extra_descs.desc: A scroll that will remove a curse from an object or person.

long_desc: A deep green scroll has been left here.

extra_descs.desc:
The orb is about the size of a small fist.  It appears to have been meant to
be placed on the end of a staff.

long_desc: An orb meant to top a staff must have fallen out here.
short_desc: an orb meant to top a staff

extra_descs.desc:
It appears to have once been a very nice staff that someone ruined by putting
it together wrong.  Someone must have not been able to "join" it properly.

long_desc: A broken and useless staff has been discarded here.

extra_descs.desc:
The liquid has a heavy metallic scent to it and is mixed with dirt and a few
other questionable liquids.

long_desc: A small trickle of red liquid flows from the shop to the north to a drain to the south.
short_desc: a thin stream of red liquid

extra_descs.desc: The closet door is made of faded wood and it has rusty hinges.

long_desc: A closet is built into the south wall of the room.
This mistletoe reeks of mold and decay.

extra_descs.desc:
The tradition of kissing under the mistletoe originated from the Druids who
considered the mistletoe sacred.  They believed that it held magical virtue and
was a remedy for evil.  The priests would cut pieces of the oak tree on which
the mistletoe grew and offer them along with two white bulls as a sacrifice to
pagan gods.  Twigs with berries were hung above doors to indicate that past
grievance and hatreds were forgiven and it was used in amulets, bracelets and
rings to ward off evil and protect against witchcraft and poisoning.  Mistletoe
symbolizes peace and love.

long_desc: A soft woody plant with green leaves and white berries is hanging over your head.

extra_descs.desc:
The sign seems to suggest that someone should kick whoever is wearing it.  A
piece of tape is affixed to the top of the small piece of paper and looks
perfect to place on someone's back.

long_desc: A sign with "kick me" written in bold black letters is laying on the ground.

extra_descs.desc:
This contraption seems to be made from a set of lungs pulled out of some very
large fish.  A hose and mouthpiece has been attached so it can be hung around
the neck.

long_desc: A pair of strange looking lungs have been left here.
